description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low perimeter wall and lush landscaping, including rows of trees and manicured bushes. The structure features a flat roof with multiple skylights and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that allow for ample natural light. The front entrance is accessible via a wide staircase leading up from a driveway, with a garage visible on one side. The property includes expansive green lawns and paved walkways, with outdoor lighting fixtures lining the main approach. The building's exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between living areas and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, enclosed by a low wall. Features include a wide staircase, garage, and expansive lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide staircase, garage to the left, and landscaped greenery with a row of trees at the back.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway, side lawn, and the arrangement of trees along the left boundary, with the main entrance partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, garage, and a large paved area with more greenery and trees along the perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the rear and side of the bungalow, with a clear view of the backyard, trees, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and skylights
